summary: P0 Security Fix - Data Isolation testing completed. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed login page shows no registration tab and displays message about client self-registration being disabled.
seed_data_creation: Created test therapist 2 and test clients during pytest execution for isolation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data isolation security fix fully tested and working: 1) GET /api/clients returns only clients assigned to current therapist (verified with 2 therapists). 2) GET /api/clients/{id} returns 404 for clients not assigned to current therapist. 3) PUT /api/clients/{id} returns 404 for clients not assigned to current therapist. 4) POST /api/clients/{id}/reset-password returns 403 for clients not assigned to current therapist. 5) POST /api/auth/register returns 403 with message about contacting therapist. 6) Super Admin GET /api/admin/clients returns ALL clients with therapist names. 7) Login page shows info message: 'Clients: Please contact your therapist to create an account for you. Client self-registration is not available.' 8) Login page has no registration tab - only 'Apply as Therapist' button for therapists.

backend_api_tests.test_get_clients_returns_only_assigned_c: PASS - therapist 1 sees own clients, therapist 2 doesn't see therapist 1's clients
backend_api_tests.test_register_endpoint_returns_403: PASS - with message about contacting therapist

frontend_ui_tests.login_page_no_registration_tab: PASS - no Register/Sign Up button for clients
frontend_ui_tests.login_page_info_message: PASS - shows 'Clients: Please contact your therapist to create an account for you. Client self-registration is not available.'
frontend_ui_tests.therapist_sees_own_clients: PASS - therapist dashboard shows only assigned clients
frontend_ui_tests.super_admin_sees_all_clients: PASS - admin Client Management shows all clients with therapist names

security_verification.data_isolation: VERIFIED - Therapists can only access their own assigned clients
security_verification.super_admin_access: VERIFIED - Can see all clients across all therapists
